title: A Taste of Home
description: Eastmoor's taverns have run dry of remedies. Bring 2 health potions.

title: Wolf Cull
description: Wolves prowl around Brackenfen and the herds are nervous. Cull 2 of them.

title: The Long Road
description: The mayor wants word carried to Brackenfen. Visit the hamlet.

title: Empty Larders
description: Brackenfen's miners go down the shafts hungry. Bring 3 loaves of bread from the Village and the mayor will see you paid.

title: Tuskers in the Mire
description: Fed at last, the diggers won't return to the bog — boars have run wild on the trail. Cull 2 of them in Brackenfen's wilds.

title: Word to the Smithy
description: The mire road is open and the ore can flow again. Carry the news to Eastmoor's forge so the trade can be struck.

title: Loggers' Provisions
description: Timberfall's saw crews work dawn to dusk and the larder's bare. Bring 3 loaves of bread and the foreman will see you paid.

title: Bandits on the Timber Road
description: Fed and back at work, the crews can't haul a plank — bandits have set on the road out of Timberfall. Drive off 2 of them in the timberlands.

title: Planks for the Forge
description: The road is clear and the wagons roll again. Carry word to Eastmoor that the timber is coming, so the smiths can fire their forges.

title: Marsh Fever
description: A fever creeps through the harbor and the healers have run dry. Bring 2 health potions to Saltmarsh.

title: Boars in the Reeds
description: The fever's broken, but the fishers won't walk the reed paths — boars have rooted up the nets. Cull 2 of them in the Saltmarsh wilds.

title: Word Up the Mire Road
description: Nets mended and the catch flowing, the harbormaster wants Brackenfen told the salt-fish trade can resume. Carry the news to Brackenfen.

title: Wolves at the Fold
description: Wolves have come down on Foxhollow's flocks and the shepherds dare not graze. Hunt down 2 of them in the surrounding country.
